method.assertion_contract: length-prefixed SHA-256 sequence of exact lexically identified assert*! macro invocation bytes inside each body
method.attribute_equivalence: length-prefixed SHA-256 sequence of exact contiguous Rust attributes preceding each function; test flavor/cfg/ignore attributes are not scaffolding
method.body_equivalence: SHA-256 over exact bytes from each function opening brace through its matched closing brace; imports and module declarations outside functions are excluded
method.embedded_fixture_contract: length-prefixed SHA-256 sequence of exact Rust string and byte-string literal token bytes inside each body
method.function_structure: lex Rust comments/literals and balance delimiters; identify uniquely named fn declarations and bodies in baseline and candidate
method.native_collection: baseline committed Darwin libtest list and candidate native Darwin libtest list must exactly equal the old/new name-map domains
method.signature_equivalence: SHA-256 over function-signature token bytes after normalizing only whitespace, a leading pub/pub(crate) visibility modifier, and an optional trailing comma in the outer parameter list
